proposed_patch.summary: Controlled reconstruction patch proposal for step_002.
proposed_patch.placeholder_text: [RECONSTRUCTION_PROPOSAL_ONLY] Step step_002 is marked for future controlled revision by plan rp_reqdemo_psdreqde. Original content is preserved. No rewrite has been applied.

rationale: Po_self emitted a reconstruct decision and ReconstructionPlan requested revise_step for this target. PR-007 only creates a deterministic patch proposal.
